decisions.why: Used latest stable Next.js 14 with App Router for modern React patterns and improved performance
Strict type checking prevents runtime errors and improves code quality for production deployment

decisions.what: ESLint with Next.js, TypeScript, and accessibility plugins
decisions.why: Comprehensive linting setup ensures code quality and accessibility compliance
Production-grade security headers protect against common web vulnerabilities
Configured device sizes and image formats optimized for mobile users in emerging markets
Automated code quality checks before commits prevent broken code from entering repository
Simplified imports improve code readability and maintainability
Documented all required environment variables for database, external services, and feature flags

decisions.what: Extended README with architecture and setup instructions
decisions.why: Detailed documentation helps developers understand project structure and get started quickly
Modern Node.js version required for Next.js 14 features and optimal performance
